footer.ctaSub: Get in touch with our team today.

home.heading: New Arrival
home.hero: The Latest Addition to Our Fleet
home.heroSub: Built for the long haul. Engineered for those who demand more from every kilometer.

services.label: What we do
services.cta: Need a custom solution? We're happy to discuss your requirements.

ftl.title: Full Truckload (FTL)
ftl.description: Dedicated full loads across Europe. Direct, efficient, on schedule.
ftl.fullDescription: We offer dedicated full truckload transport across Europe. Your cargo gets its own truck — no sharing, no stops, no delays. Ideal for time-sensitive or high-volume shipments that need to move fast and arrive intact.

refrigerated.title: Refrigerated Transport
refrigerated.description: Temperature-controlled cargo handled with care from pickup to delivery.
refrigerated.fullDescription: Our refrigerated vehicles maintain precise temperature conditions throughout the entire journey. Whether you're shipping food, pharmaceuticals, or other perishables, we ensure your cargo arrives in perfect condition.

international.title: International Routes
international.description: Regular lanes across the EU from our Zagreb base, built for reliability.
international.fullDescription: Operating from our Zagreb base, we run regular lanes across the European Union. With experience navigating cross-border logistics, customs, and documentation, we keep your freight moving without friction.

about.label: Our story
about.heading: A young company with a serious commitment to quality.
about.backgroundP1: Mandic Transport was founded in Zagreb, Croatia with a clear goal — to provide reliable, professional international freight services across Europe. Though we are a young company, we operate with the discipline and standards of a seasoned logistics partner.
about.backgroundP2: We invest in premium equipment, starting with our Scania 500 S fleet, because we believe the quality of your truck reflects the quality of your service. Every shipment we take on is handled with full accountability from pickup to delivery.
about.teamDescription: Our small but dedicated team handles everything from route planning and documentation to customer communication and on-road logistics. We take pride in being reachable, responsive, and transparent with every client we work with.

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.heading: Let's talk about your next shipment.
contact.name: Name
contact.sentSub: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
